notes: 3-pack $13.49: https://www.seeedstudio.com/Seeed-Studio-XIAO-ESP32C3-3PCS-p-5920.html — also on Amazon (B0B94JZ2YF). Onboard LiPo charging + BLE

Primary. Reads the winder's factory encoder disc through the ~5x5mm top-face window; peak sensitivity ~2.5mm matches the ~3mm recess. Package is wider than the window — domes partially overhang (see wiring.md). Buy bare sensors, not LM393 comparator modules — the firmware wants the raw analog signal

Documented fallback if the TCRT5000's signal swing off the encoder disc is poor. Compact SMD package fits inside the window footprint. Base ITR8307 part is out of stock at DigiKey; the /TR8 variant ships
Collector to 3V3; reflection pulls the ADC reading low

M1 — skip for M0 breadboard (USB-C powers it). XIAO has bare BAT solder pads, no connector: buy wired cells and VERIFY POLARITY with a multimeter before soldering — lead colors from these vendors are not trustworthy. 401230 (4x12x30mm) also fits and is easier to find with protection PCM (e.g. B0FT3GG4ZL)
M1 — 2.54mm pitch, breadboard-friendly. Adafruit 805 is the name-brand equivalent
Models land in /models after M0b validates the optical signal
Any 400-point board + jumper kit; skip if you have them
